observations.title: resume.ts の修正対象が背景節にとどまり受け入れ基準に未記載
observations.rationale: 要件 3 の「member→coordinator 写像後も元の resumePoint を保持」は resume.ts:274 のゲート修正を示唆するが、受け入れ基準に修正対象ファイルが明示されていない。実装者が自力で辿り着けるレベルなのでブロッカーではない。

observations.title: TC-RC-004 との関係が未言及
observations.rationale: 既存テスト TC-RC-004 は逐次実行で deps.resumePrompt がクリアされることを assert している。並列 round を per-member copy で修正すれば TC-RC-004 は変更不要だが、要件 4（逐次経路不変）との整合を読み手が確認する必要がある。設計判断節に一言あると明快。

toolResult.reason: Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/round-immutable-input/ on branch change/round-immutable-input-b794df81. Plan covers: (D1) relocate resume-input one-shot ownership from StepExecutor to Pipeline.runInternal, removing the in-place deps mutation; (D2) ParallelReviewRound builds a readonly per-round execution input; (D3) preserve automatic resume context across member→coordinator mapping via mapMemberToCoordinator; (D4) fix intended distribution invariants (human note → all pending members, automatic context → target member) without fixing the accidental behavior. architecture/ untouched (B-16 ratify deferred). No src/ or README edits performed — planning only.

findings.title: Shallow clone does not protect nested deps fields
findings.rationale: D2's `roundDeps = { ...deps }` is a shallow clone. Member execution that mutates a nested property (e.g. `deps.config.someField`) would still affect the shared `deps`. The Risks section correctly acknowledges this, and tests only validate `resumePrompt`/`resumeContext` immutability, which is sufficient for the stated scope. No action required for this request, but the limitation is unmentioned in spec.md Req-1.

findings.title: CLI step resume note behavior not analyzed in D1
findings.rationale: The Pipeline `firstUnitExecuted` flag marks CLI steps as 'consumed' even though CLI steps never read `deps.resumePrompt/Context`. In the edge case where resume starts at a CLI step with a human note, old behavior propagated the note to the next agent step (since CLI did not clear deps); new behavior silently drops it. Neither is semantically correct, and the scenario is extremely unlikely in practice. The design does not mention this change.

findings.title: T-05 migration target ambiguity — TC-RC-001~003 may be accidentally deleted
findings.rationale: T-05 says to 'delete/update' the in-place-clear mechanism assertions in executor-resume-context.test.ts, but does not specify that TC-RC-001~003 (resumeSessionId tests) are unaffected. An implementer reading the task could mistakenly remove all tests in those files.

observations.title: In-place clear confirmed at executor.ts:243-246
observations.rationale: The target mutation block (`deps.resumePrompt = undefined; deps.resumeContext = undefined;`) exists exactly where the spec describes. Design is grounded in the actual code.

observations.title: Strict equality gate confirmed at resume.ts:274
observations.rationale: The `startStep === resumePoint.step` gate that drops automatic context on member→coordinator resume exists exactly as described. D3 fix is correctly targeted.

observations.title: mapMemberToCoordinator is currently non-exported
observations.rationale: Function is declared as `function mapMemberToCoordinator` (no export keyword). T-04's export addition is the minimal correct change.

message: spec-review iteration 1 completed with verdict: approved
